title: verbascum × kuetahyense
intro: Verbascum × kuetahyense, a rare and unique plant species, is a hybrid of the Verbascum thapsus and Verbascum phoeniceum, and is also known as the mullein-verbascum or Verbascum hybrid. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is rich in health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and calming digestive issues, due to its high content of mucilage, a soothing and protective substance. The herbal preparations of Verbascum × kuetahyense include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
